title: H/L SPRAYMIST 500ML 4120
description: From the manufacturer Hozelock Spraymist Trigger Sprayer Small indoor sprayer, purposely created for use around the home & patio. Spraymist Trigger Sprayer The Spraymist Sprayer is a compact and versatile tool, perfect for a wide range of indoor applications. Whether you're lightly dampening clothes during ironing, misting houseplants to maintain humidity, or gently cooling and cleaning pets, this sprayer delivers reliable and easy-to-control performance. It features a fully adjustable nozzle, allowing you to switch seamlessly between a fine jet and a medium spray to suit different tasks. Designed for everyday use, the Spraymist Sprayer is lightweight, easy to handle, and made from durable materials. Available in two convenient sizes – 0.5L and 1L – it's ideal for both occasional and more frequent use around the home. Whether you're caring for your indoor garden, managing household chores, or simply need a fine mist at your fingertips, the Spraymist Sprayer offers practical, user-friendly functionality in a simple and effective design. Key Benefits Include: Ideal for indoor tasks like plant care, ironing, and pet cooling. Adjustable nozzle switches from a precise jet to a fine mist. Translucent bottle with measurements for easy filling and monitoring. Indoor Watering Perfect for keeping houseplants healthy, the Hozelock Trigger Sprayer offers a quick and easy way to water a variety of indoor plants. Its lightweight, ergonomic design makes it comfortable to use, while the adjustable spray nozzle allows for precise control—whether you're misting delicate leaves or giving soil a targeted soak. A simple yet effective solution for everyday indoor plant care. Adjustable Nozzle Easily adjust the Hozelock Trigger Sprayer nozzle from a fine jet to a gentle spray mist, giving you the flexibility to water a variety of plants with precision. Whether you're caring for indoor houseplants or tending to pots and containers outside, this sprayer provides comfortable, controlled watering for every need. Outdoor Watering The 0.5L and 1L Hozelock Trigger Sprayers are perfect for watering plants in hard-to-reach areas where a standard hose can't reach. Lightweight and easy to handle, they offer precise control, making them ideal for indoor plants, balconies, patios, or greenhouse use.
